code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut p = 0
  mut neg = 0
  mut i = 0
  mut cur = 0
  mut sign = 1
  mut has = false
  while i <= n
    mut b = 32
    if i < n
      b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(v)
        v
      when None
        32
      end
    end
    let is_space = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
    if is_space
      if has
        let val = cur * sign
        if val > 0
          p = p + val
        end
        if val < 0
          neg = neg + val
        end
      end
      cur = 0
      sign = 1
      has = false
    else if b == 45
      sign = -1
    else if b == 43
      sign = 1
    else
      cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
      has = true
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  let r = p - neg
  print("r=#{r}")
end
